passiveAbilities.name: Glaive
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Älskling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Dmg this character would suffer by -1 for each other friendly Gnome or Animal within 4”, to a maximum of -2.

arcaneAbilities.name: Pixie-Elf Elixer
arcaneAbilities.description:
This character gains X+1 energy.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Revenge of the Forest Friends
arcaneAbilities.description:
This attack is not modified by Cover.
Target within 3” of a Tree or Wooded Patch terrain suffers X Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: Target gains [Protection: The first time this character would suffer Dmg, reduce that Dmg to W], until end of turn.

signatureMove.name: Valkyrie Cyclone
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Deal 2 Slicing Dmg to all models within 2” that did not participate in this round of melee. This does not count as Melee Dmg.
